title: Building Workforce AI Agents with Visier and Amazon Quick
summary: In this post, we show how connecting the Visier Workforce AI platform with Amazon Quick through Model Context Protocol (MCP) gives every knowledge worker a unified agentic workspace to ask questions in. Visier helps ground the workspace in live workforce data and the organizational context that surrounds it while letting your users act on the conversational results without switching tools.

title: Introducing Brand Studio: The creative production platform powered by your brand
summary: We’re excited to introduce Brand Studio by Stability AI, the end-to-end creative production platform powered by your brand.

title: Stability AI Joins the Tech Coalition
summary: We’re pleased to share that Stability AI has joined the Tech Coalition, a global alliance of leading technology companies working together to combat online child sexual exploitation and abuse.

title: Warner Music Group and Stability AI Join Forces To Build The Next Generation Of Responsible AI Tools For Music Creation
summary: Warner Music Group and Stability AI today announced a collaborative effort to advance the use of responsible AI in music creation, combining WMG’s long-standing advocacy for principled innovation with Stability AI’s expertise and leadership in commercially-safe generative audio.

title: Universal Music Group and Stability AI Announce Strategic Alliance to Co-Develop Professional AI Music Creation Tools
summary: Universal Music Group and Stability AI today announced a strategic alliance to develop next-generation professional music creation tools, powered by responsibly trained generative AI and built to support the creative process of artists, producers and songwriters globally.

title: Stability AI and EA Partner to Empower Artists, Designers, and Developers to Reimagine Game Development
summary: Stability AI and Electronic Arts (EA) have formed a strategic partnership to co-develop transformative generative AI models, tools, and workflows that empower EA’s artists, designers, and developers to reimagine how games are made.

title: Stability AI Brings Image Services to Amazon Bedrock, Delivering End-to-End Creative Control with Enterprise-Grade Infrastructure
summary: Today, we're excited to announce we’re expanding our partnership with Amazon Web Services to bring our Stable Image Services to Amazon Bedrock.

title: Stability AI’s Annual Integrity Transparency Report
summary: At Stability AI, we are committed to building and deploying generative AI responsibly, and we believe that transparency is foundational to safe and ethical AI.

title: Stability AI Introduces Stable Audio 2.5, the First Audio Model Built for Enterprise Sound Production at Scale
summary: We’re excited to release Stable Audio 2.5, our latest audio model and the first developed for enterprise-grade use cases. Stable Audio 2.5 introduces advancements in quality and control that address the demand for dynamic compositions that can be adapted for custom brand needs.

title: Why MoE models get more from speculative decoding
summary: MoE models enhance speculative decoding through bandwidth-bound sweet spots, expert routing correlation reducing unique weight loading, and fixed-overhead amortization at low batch sizes.

title: Accelerate RL rollouts by up to 50% with distribution-aware speculative decoding
summary: Rollout is the silent bottleneck in RL post-training. DAS fixes it with adaptive speculative decoding — up to 50% faster, zero degradation in reward quality.

title: Submit Today
DeepSeek-R1 Release
Thinking Mode
introducing DeepSeek-V3
Context Caching is Available 2024/08/02
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: New API Features 2024/07/25
summary: The DeepSeek API now supports V4-Pro and V4-Flash, available via both the OpenAI ChatCompletions interface and the Anthropic interface. To access the new models, the base_url remains unchanged, and the model parameter should be set to deepseek-v4-pro or deepseek-v4-flash .

title: AutoClaw launched as a one-minute computer agent installer
summary: Zhipu AI highlights AutoClaw as a product that can install its 'lobster' agent capability on any computer in about one minute. It is presented as a named product in the company's native product lineup.

title: GLM-5-Turbo announced for agent-focused scenarios
summary: GLM-5-Turbo is introduced as a foundation model optimized specifically for agent use cases, with deep training-level improvements to tool use and long-horizon execution. Zhipu positions it as part of its new-generation full-stack large model system.

title: GLM-5 released as Zhipu AI's flagship agent foundation model
summary: Zhipu AI presents GLM-5 as a new flagship base model for agent engineering, claiming open-source SOTA performance in coding and agent capabilities. The page also states that GLM-5 performs strongly on SWE-bench Verified and Terminal Bench 2.0, comparable to Claude Opus 4.5.

title: GLM-4.6V introduced as an open-source visual reasoning model
summary: GLM-4.6V is described as a globally competitive 100B-class open-source visual reasoning model. Zhipu says it achieves same-scale SOTA visual understanding accuracy, supports native tool calling, automatic task completion, and 128K context.

title: AutoGLM announced as an autonomous agent model
summary: AutoGLM is presented as an agent model with autonomous planning, reasoning, and execution capabilities. Zhipu says it addresses core challenges in task planning, data scarcity, and policy optimization while enabling continuous self-improvement.

title: CogAgent-9B open-sourced as the base model for GLM-PC
summary: Zhipu AI announced that it is open-sourcing CogAgent-9B, the base model behind GLM-PC, to support the broader large-model agent ecosystem. The model, CogAgent-9B-20241220, is trained from GLM-4V-9B and is designed for agent tasks using only screenshots as input.

title: GLM-OS concept unveiled alongside AutoGLM and GLM-PC
summary: On November 29, Zhipu formally proposed the GLM-OS concept and released two agent products: AutoGLM and GLM-PC. This announcement framed the company's push into agent operating systems and computer-use agents.

title: GLM-PC entered internal testing as a computer-use agent
summary: Zhipu says GLM-PC has started internal testing as part of its latest agent progress. The product is described as enabling human-like computer operation based on visual understanding, while AutoGLM can execute more than 50 steps and work across apps and devices.

Seed3D 2.0 Released: Higher Precision and Greater Usability
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed3D 2.0, highlighting improved precision and better usability over the previous version. The release is presented as a new model update in the company's blog.

title: Introducing Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced its Full-Duplex Speech LLM, emphasizing attentive listening, robust interference suppression, and more natural interaction. The announcement positions it as a new speech model for conversational AI.

title: ByteDance Seed 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment is Now Open
summary: ByteDance Seed announced the opening of its 2027 Foundation Model Campus Recruitment program, including internship opportunities. This is a company recruitment news item rather than a product launch.

title: Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview Model Release on Arena
summary: ByteDance Seed released the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model on Arena. The post indicates an early preview availability of the model for evaluation or testing.

title: Seed 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0. The announcement marks a major model release in the company's lineup.

title: Introducing Seedream 5.0 Lite
summary: ByteDance Seed introduced Seedream 5.0 Lite, describing it as offering deeper thinking and more accurate generation. The release appears to be a new lightweight model variant.

title: Seedance 2.0 Official Launch
summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seedance 2.0. The post presents it as a new model release from the company.

title: Seed Prover 1.5
summary: ByteDance Seed announced Seed Prover 1.5, focused on advanced mathematical reasoning through a novel agentic architecture. The release highlights progress in reasoning-oriented AI models.

title: WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5 announced
summary: 01.AI announced WorldWise Enterprise LLM Platform 2.5, positioning 2026 as a critical year for enterprise deployment of multi-agent systems. The update is presented as a major milestone for enterprise AI adoption.

title: 01.AI launches “Super Employee” enterprise AI agent
summary: 01.AI launched “Super Employee,” an enterprise AI agent aimed at delivering measurable business value. The announcement frames it as a new phase for enterprise AI agents focused on practical business outcomes.

title: 01.AI LLM One-box Solution Machine receives CAICT top-level certification
summary: 01.AI announced that its LLM One-box Solution Machine received top-level certification from CAICT. This certification highlights external validation of the company’s enterprise AI infrastructure offering.

title: Yi-Lightning open-source Mixture-of-Experts LLM highlighted
summary: 01.AI featured Yi-Lightning as a global state-of-the-art Mixture-of-Experts large language model and noted it as open source. The mention positions Yi-Lightning as a flagship model announcement from the company.

title: Kazakhstan President Tokayev meets 01.AI CEO Kai-Fu Lee
summary: 01.AI highlighted a meeting between Kazakhstan President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev and CEO Kai-Fu Lee. The event signals high-level international engagement around the company and AI collaboration.

title: Jeffrey Ma presents at Yabuli China Entrepreneurs Forum
summary: 01.AI announced that co-founder Jeffrey Ma presented at the Yabuli China Entrepreneurs Forum. The appearance is a notable company event reflecting executive visibility in China’s business community.

title: Kai-Fu Lee reappointed to Hong Kong Chief Executive's Council of Advisers
summary: 01.AI shared that Dr. Kai-Fu Lee was reappointed to the Hong Kong Chief Executive's Council of Advisers. The reappointment is a notable leadership and policy-related company news item.
